title: Thread State Lifecycle Diagram
description: A visual representation of the possible states of a Thread in Java and the transitions between them, as defined by the Thread.State enumeration.
relationships: Thread.start() moves from NEW to RUNNABLE
Synchronized I/O or monitor lock acquisition moves to BLOCKED
Object.wait() or Thread.join() moves to WAITING
Thread.sleep() or Object.wait(timeout) moves to TIMED_WAITING
Run method completes or exits moves to TERMINATED
